hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Examines and collects the TODOs from your C# code.

options.name: inputs
options.description: Glob patterns of the files to be inspected

options.name: excludes
options.description: Glob patterns of the files to be excluded from inspection

options.name: prefixes
options.description: Prefix regular expressions marking the TODOs. [Default: ^TODO ^BUG ^HACK]

options.name: disallowed-prefixes
options.description: Prefix regular expressions which should not occur. [Default: ^DONT-CHECK-IN ^Todo ^todo ^ToDo ^Bug ^bug ^Hack ^hack]

options.name: suffixes
options.description: Suffix regular expressions that TODOs must conform to. [Default: ^ \([^)]+, [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\): .]

options.name: case-insensitive
options.description: If set, the regular expressions are applied as case-insensitive

options.name: report-path
options.description: If set, outputs the TODOs as a JSON (the path '-' denotes STDOUT).

options.name: verbose
options.description: If set, makes the console output more verbose
